prompt: Hyper-realistic 8k medium shot of a young East Asian woman with long, straight brunette hair in a traditional cedar-wood tea house. She wears a simple white linen blouse. Color palette: 50% pale wood and straw tones, 30% soft whites, 20% skin tones. Highly detailed linen textures, sharp focus, masterpiece, textless.
